name: Goat of Mendes
description: Baphomet is a figure rooted in the occult and Western esoteric traditions. The name first emerged in the 14th century during the Trials of the Knights Templar, when the order was accused of heresy for worshipping Baphomet as a demonic idol.[3][4] Baphomet was reimagined by 19th century occultists amidst renewed debate over the suppression of the Templars.[3][4]
